<item>
      <title>Vijayanagara at Its Zenith: The Splendour of Deva Raya II and the Cracks After Glory</title>
      <description>This episode follows Vijayanagara at the height of its magnificence under Deva Raya II through the astonished eyes of Nicolo Conti and Abdur Razzak: a vast capital of seven walls, immense bazaars, roses, jewels, elephants, and dazzling royal festivals. It then traces the uncertainty, overlapping successions, violence, coastal losses, and rise of Narasimha that marked the first dynasty’s decline after that peak. Based on A Forgotten Empire (Vijayanagar) by Robert Sewell (1900). </description>
